## AbstractCompoundDefType.conceptParts property

Concept parts associated with the compound.

**Signature:**

```typescript
conceptParts?: ConceptPartsDataModel | undefined;
```

## Remarks

Contains the structured `conceptparts` content emitted by Doxygen for concept definitions. This property captures the ordered mixture of code fragments and documentation fragments extracted from 'conceptparts' XML elements, preserving their original sequence for later rendering in the generated documentation.
